overview: ASKIR 36BR is a portable suction unit for the aspiration of body liquids, oral, nasal and tracheal aspiration in adults or children.For professional use and with a powerful aspiration of max 36 l/min, ASKIR 36BR is lightweight for easy transport.Three different options for operation: AC/DC adapter, internal rechargeable battery and 12V make it a versatile suction unit approved for NON-STOP operation without overheating.Provided with visual and acoustic alarm indicating low battery level.Available with Lead-type battery or Li-ion battery.The Li-ion battery model is equipped with a pressure sensor placed in the PCB that reduces by 50% the speed of the motor when no vacuum is detected and therefore no aspiration is taking place, and PROXIMITY function to switch ON/OFF without touch. Main Applications Ambulance Car Emergency Department Home Care Patient Transfer Room / Ward Tracheostomy Veterinary Accessories Included Liquid collection jar with overflow valve system (multiple options available) 8×14 mm silicone tubes (150 cm, autoclavable) with conical connector (10–11–12 mm) Antibacterial & hydrophobic filter (single-patient use) Power cord + 12V car adapter + AC/DC universal adapter

specs.label: Battery
specs.value: Lead rechargeable – autonomy up to 60 min (charging time ~4 hours)

notes: Stand on 5 castors Ø 50 mm with brakes (antistatic upon request)
